column2: ggplot(np_melt[np_melt$variable=="Median.read.quality",], aes(x=Condition, y=as.numeric(value), fill=Protocol, group=Protocol)) + stat_summary(fun="mean", geom="bar", aes(fill=Protocol), position=position_dodge(0.95)) + stat_summary(geom="errorbar", colour="black", position=position_dodge(0.95))+facet_wrap(~variable) + ylab("Median Read Quality")+scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,20))+ scale_fill_manual(values=c("navy", "turquoise3"))
